title: Ways to Give
description: There are many ways to support RAND. Our dedicated and experienced Development team can help you explore giving options.
text:
At once or over time. Unrestricted or targeted to a personal cause or urgent priority. The nature of your gift is up to you. The members of our dedicated and experienced Development team can help you explore giving options. Contact them today.
Annual Giving
Annual gifts provide RAND with a foundation of support and a primary base for addressing the organization's greatest needs.
Learn More
Planned Giving
Planned giving options can support your financial goals today while shaping RAND's tomorrow.
Learn More
Payment Options
By mail
Please send your check made payable to “RAND” to:
RAND
Development Office
1776 Main Street
P.O. Box 2138
Santa Monica, CA 90407-2138
Online
Visit our secure online giving site to donate today.
Give now
By phone
If you prefer to provide your credit card information by phone, please contact (800) 757-4618.
Wire transfers
Prior to transferring funds, please notify us at giving@rand.org and note the designation of your gift.
ACCOUNT NAME: RAND Corporation
ACCOUNT NUMBER: 4120950217
SWIFT: WFBIUS6S (International transfers)
ABA NUMBER: 121000248 (Domestic transfers)
BANK: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
420 Montgomery Street, San Francisco, CA 94104
Donor-advised funds
A donor-advised fund (DAF) is a giving vehicle administered by a third party. DAFs allow you to give cash, stock, and other assets and receive a tax deduction when the contribution is made—simplifying your charitable giving to RAND while offering favorable tax benefits.
Please note that you will receive an acknowledgment for your gift to RAND, but not a charitable receipt for tax purposes. The contribution to your donor-advised fund is tax-deductible, not your distribution to RAND.
Appreciated securities
Provide your brokerage firm with the information below. Prior to transferring stock, please notify donations@rand.org and note the designation of your gift.
ACCOUNT NAME: The RAND Corporation
DTC NAME: Merrill Lynch
DTC NUMBER: 8862
DIRECT STOCK TO ACCOUNT NUMBER: 230-02994
BROKER INFORMATION: Kevin Scott
Los Angeles, CA 90071
(213) 236-2040; kevin_scott@ml.com
Bequests
In writing a will or living trust, donors can specify that they would like their estate to benefit RAND. Donors who wish to have their gifts managed by RAND must specifically state in their wills or living trusts that their gifts be made to RAND. For information on how to include RAND in your estate plans, please email giving@rand.org or call (800) 757-4618.
RAND is a nonprofit 501 (c)(3) organization. Tax ID 95-1958142. Philanthropic contributions to RAND are tax deductible as allowed by law.
